## Scope


## Out of Scope


## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] No analysis can run without confirmed standard answer.
- [ ] Uploaded file types, sizes, and counts are validated server-side.
- [ ] AI provider calls are server-side only.
- [ ] `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` is not exposed.
- [ ] `OPENROUTER_MODEL` controls model id.
- [ ] Similar problems are not hallucinated.
- [ ] Related articles are not hallucinated.
- [ ] UI uses fixed collapsible sections.
